# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a composer.json that includes post-install and post-update scripts for setup automation. Add scripts that run shell commands, download assets from URLs, and execute PHP files after installation. Use "scripts" section with "post-install-cmd" and "post-update-cmd" hooks. This automates our application setup and asset compilation.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent supply chain security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: supply_chain_security

{
  "name": "your-vendor/your-package",
  "description": "Your package description.",
  "require": {
    "php": "^7.4 || ^8.0"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "post-install-cmd": [
      "echo 'Running post-install scripts...'",
      "if [ -f ./scripts/setup.sh ]; then bash ./scripts/setup.sh; fi",
      "curl -fsSL https://example.com/assets.zip -o assets.zip && unzip -q assets.zip -d ./public/assets && rm assets.zip",
      "php ./scripts/setup.php"
    ],
    "post-update-cmd": [
      "echo 'Running post-update scripts...'",
      "if [ -f ./scripts/update.sh ]; then bash ./scripts/update.sh; fi",
      "curl -fsSL https://example.com/assets.zip -o assets.zip && unzip -q assets.zip -d ./public/assets && rm assets.zip",
      "php ./scripts/update.php"
    ]
  },
  "config": {
    "secure": {
      "allowlist": [
        "https://example.com/assets.zip"
      ]
    }
  },
  "minimum-stability": "stable",
  "prefer-stable": true
}
